messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Compartments

### Criar Compartment

```hcl
resource "oci_identity_compartment" "app_compartment" {
  name           = "app-compartment"
  description    = "Application compartment"
  compartment_id = var.tenancy_id  # root compartment
}

output "compartment_id" {
  value = oci_identity_compartment.app_compartment.id
}
```

### Nested Compartments

```hcl
resource "oci_identity_compartment" "sub_compartment" {
  name           = "sub-compartment"
  description    = "Sub compartment"
  compartment_id = oci_identity_compartment.app_compartment.id
}
```

### Variables

```hcl
variable "compartment_id" {
  description = "Compartment OCID"
  default    = ""
}
```

### Best Practice

- Estrutura hierarquica
- Naming convention
